questionHtml:
Which substance has the following 1H NMR spectrum?

SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Science and Technology.


A.  Propane

B.  Propanal

C.  Butanoic acid

D.  Ethyl ethanoate

meta.title: Which substance has the following 1H NMR spectrum? SDBS, National Institute of Advanced Science and Technology. A. Propane B. Propanal C. Butanoic acid D. Ethyl ethanoate
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.2—Functional groups: Classification of organic compounds

Structure 3.2.11—Individual signals can be split into clusters of peaks. Interpret 1H NMR spectra from splitting patterns showing singlets, doublets, triplets and quartets to deduce greater structural detail. Data for interpretation of 1H NMR spectra are given in the data booklet.
